name: Cheese Muffins with Apple Variation (Jvb)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Melted butter (or 1/4 cup vegetable oil)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------APPLE MUFFINS VARIATION:--------------------------
Replace the cheese with:
2 cups Apple cubes
Add to taste:
Cinnamon and Nutmeg
-------------------------TOPPING FOR APPLE MUFFINS:-------------------------
1/4 cup Butter
1/2 cup Flour
1/2 cup Golden sugar
In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
Stir in the grated cheese. In a small bowl, mix together yogurt, butter (or oil), and beaten eggs; add to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened. Fill greased muffin pans with batter. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes or until done. This recipe makes 12 muffins.
For the Apple Muffins: prepare as above, substituting apple cubes for cheese. Mix the topping ingredients together and distribute over the batter before baking. This variation tends to yield more muffins than the cheese version.
